title: phleum pratense subsp. praecox
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. praecox, also known as early meadow grass or red fescue, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phleum pratense subsp. praecox include reducing inflammation and soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Phleum pratense subsp. praecox include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
